title: EnergyCommunityStorage
description: Energy storage (battery) measurement for a community member, derived from the StorageBatteryMeasurement Smart Data Model. Captures battery level, state of charge, power in/out, capacity, and operating status.

id.description: Unique identifier of the entity in URN format (urn:ngsi-ld:EnergyCommunityStorage:<instance-id>)

type.description: NGSI-LD entity type. Must be EnergyCommunityStorage.

batteryLevel.description: Current battery charge level as a percentage (0-100). Derived from StorageBatteryMeasurement.

stateOfCharge.description: State of charge of the battery, in ampere-hours (Ah) or kilowatt-hours (kWh). Derived from StorageBatteryMeasurement.

activePowerIn.description: Active power flowing into the battery (charging), in Watts (W). Derived from StorageBatteryMeasurement.

activePowerOut.description: Active power flowing out of the battery (discharging), in Watts (W). Derived from StorageBatteryMeasurement.

batteryCapacity.description: Total energy capacity of the battery, in kilowatt-hours (kWh). Derived from StorageBatteryMeasurement.

operatingStatus.description: Current operating status of the battery. Community extension indicating the human-readable battery state.

dateObserved.description: Timestamp of the measurement observation in ISO 8601 format.

address.description: Postal address of the battery storage location.

location.description: GeoJSON Point geometry representing the battery storage location.

coordinates.description: GeoJSON coordinates [longitude, latitude] or [longitude, latitude, altitude].

refDevice.description: URN reference to the battery device entity (e.g., urn:ngsi-ld:Device:battery-001).

refMember.description: URN reference to the EnergyCommunityMember entity associated with this storage measurement.
